javascript:(function(u%2Cy)%7Btypeof%20exports%3D%3D%22object%22%26%26typeof%20module%3C%22u%22%3Fy(exports)%3Atypeof%20define%3D%3D%22function%22%26%26define.amd%3Fdefine(%5B%22exports%22%5D%2Cy)%3A(u%3Dtypeof%20globalThis%3C%22u%22%3FglobalThis%3Au%7C%7Cself%2Cy(u.Sidetation%3D%7B%7D))%7D)(this%2Cfunction(u)%7B%22use%20strict%22%3Bconst%20y%3D%60%0A%3Ahost%20%7B%0A%20%20all%3A%20initial%3B%0A%7D%0A*%20%7B%0A%20%20box-sizing%3A%20border-box%3B%0A%20%20font-family%3A%20-apple-system%2C%20BlinkMacSystemFont%2C%20%22Segoe%20UI%22%2C%20%22PingFang%20SC%22%2C%20%22Hiragino%20Sans%20GB%22%2C%20sans-serif%3B%0A%7D%0A%0A%2F*%20----%20hover%20highlight%20----%20*%2F%0A.hover-box%20%7B%0A%20%20position%3A%20fixed%3B%0A%20%20display%3A%20none%3B%0A%20%20pointer-events%3A%20none%3B%0A%20%20border%3A%201px%20dashed%20rgba(79%2C%20140%2C%20255%2C%200.9)%3B%0A%20%20background%3A%20rgba(79%2C%20140%2C%20255%2C%200.08)%3B%0A%20%20z-index%3A%201%3B%0A%7D%0A%0A%2F*%20----%20selection%20box%20%2B%20handles%20----%20*%2F%0A.sel-box%20%7B%0A%20%20position%3A%20fixed%3B%0A%20%20display%3A%20none%3B%0A%20%20pointer-events%3A%20none%3B%0A%20%20border%3A%201.5px%20solid%20%234f8cff%3B%0A%20%20z-index%3A%202%3B%0A%7D%0A.sel-label%20%7B%0A%20%20position%3A%20absolute%3B%0A%20%20top%3A%20-24px%3B%0A%20%20left%3A%20-1.5px%3B%0A%20%20padding%3A%202px%208px%3B%0A%20%20background%3A%20%234f8cff%3B%0A%20%20color%3A%20%23fff%3B%0A%20%20font-size%3A%2011px%3B%0A%20%20line-height%3A%2016px%3B%0A%20%20border-radius%3A%204px%3B%0A%20%20white-space%3A%20nowrap%3B%0A%20%20pointer-events%3A%20none%3B%0A%7D%0A.handle%20%7B%0A%20%20position%3A%20absolute%3B%0A%20%20width%3A%2010px%3B%0A%20%20height%3A%2010px%3B%0A%20%20background%3A%20%23fff%3B%0A%20%20border%3A%201.5px%20solid%20%234f8cff%3B%0A%20%20border-radius%3A%202px%3B%0A%20%20pointer-events%3A%20auto%3B%0A%7D%0A.handle%5Bdata-dir%3D%22nw%22%5D%20%7B%20top%3A%20-6px%3B%20%20left%3A%20-6px%3B%20%20cursor%3A%20nwse-resize%3B%20%7D%0A.handle%5Bdata-dir%3 ocument.documentElement.appendChild(this.host)%7Dplace(t%2Ce)%7Bif(!e)%7Bt.style.display%3D%22none%22%3Breturn%7Dt.style.display%3D%22block%22%2Ct.style.left%3D%60%24%7Be.left%7Dpx%60%2Ct.style.top%3D%60%24%7Be.top%7Dpx%60%2Ct.style.width%3D%60%24%7Be.width%7Dpx%60%2Ct.style.height%3D%60%24%7Be.height%7Dpx%60%7DsetHover(t)%7Bthis.place(this.hoverBox%2Ct)%7DsetSelection(t%2Ce%3D%22%22)%7Bthis.place(this.selBox%2Ct)%2Ct%26%26(this.selLabel.textContent%3De)%7DsetGuides(t%2Ce)%7Bthis.guideV.style.display%3Dt%3D%3D%3Dnull%3F%22none%22%3A%22block%22%2Ct!%3D%3Dnull%26%26(this.guideV.style.left%3D%60%24%7Bt%7Dpx%60)%2Cthis.guideH.style.display%3De%3D%3D%3Dnull%3F%22none%22%3A%22block%22%2Ce!%3D%3Dnull%26%26(this.guideH.style.top%3D%60%24%7Be%7Dpx%60)%7Dtoast(t)%7Bthis.toastEl.textContent%3Dt%2Cthis.toastEl.classList.add(%22show%22)%2CclearTimeout(this.toastTimer)%2Cthis.toastTimer%3Dwindow.setTimeout(()%3D%3Ethis.toastEl.classList.remove(%22show%22)%2C1600)%7Ddestroy()%7BclearTimeout(this.toastTimer)%2Cthis.host.remove()%7D%7Dconst%20M%3D%2F(%5E%7C%5B-_%5D)%5B0-9a-f%5D%7B5%2C%7D(%5B-_%5D%7C%24)%7C%5E(css%7Csc%7Cjss%7Cemotion)-%7C__%5BA-Za-z0-9%5D%7B5%2C%7D%24%2Fi%2Cj%3D%5B%22data-testid%22%2C%22data-test%22%2C%22data-cy%22%5D%3Bfunction%20E(n)%7Breturn%20Array.from(n.classList).filter(t%3D%3Et.length%3C%3D24%26%26!M.test(t)%26%26!%2F%5Cd%7B3%2C%7D%2F.test(t)).slice(0%2C2)%7Dfunction%20S(n)%7Breturn!n.id%7C%7C%2F%5Cd%7B3%2C%7D%2F.test(n.id)%7C%7C%2F%5E%5B0-9a-f-%5D%7B8%2C%7D%24%2Fi.test(n.id)%3Fnull%3An.id%7Dfunction%20%24(n)%7Bconst%20t%3Dn.tagName.toLowerCase()%3Bfor(const%20s%20of%20j)%7Bconst%20i%3Dn.getAttribute(s)%3Bif(i)return%60%24%7Bt%7D%5B%24%7Bs%7D%3D%22%24%7Bi%7D%22%5D%60%7Dconst%20e%3DE(n).map(s%3D%3E%60.%24%7BCSS.escape(s)%7D%60).join(%22%22)%3Breturn%20t%2Be%7Dfunction%20v(n%2Ct)%7Btry%7Bconst%20e%3Ddocument.querySelectorAll(n)%3Breturn%20e.length%3D%3D%3D1%26%26e%5B0%5D%3D%3D%3Dt%7Dcatch%7Breturn!1%7D%7Dfunction%20I(n)%7Bconst%20t%3DS(n)%3Bif(t)%7Bconst%20o%3
